# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official Python runtime as a parent image
FROM python:3.7-slim

# Set the working directory to /app
WORKDIR /app

# Add all necessary files to the container at /app
ADD . /app

# Install any needed packages specified in requirements.txt
RUN pip install --trusted-host pypi.python.org -r requirements.txt

# Database Service
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y postgresql postgresql-contrib
RUN service postgresql start

# API Server
FROM node:10.13-alpine
WORKDIR /api-server
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . .
EXPOSE 8080

# Web Server
FROM nginx:1.15-alpine
COPY ./default.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
EXPOSE 80

# Redis Service
FROM redis:5.0-alpine
WORKDIR /data
CMD ["redis-server"]
EXPOSE 6379

# Make ports 80, 8080, 5432 and 6379 available to the world outside this container
EXPOSE 80
EXPOSE 8080
EXPOSE 5432
EXPOSE 6379

# Run the command on container startup
CMD service postgresql start && node /api-server/index.js && nginx -g "daemon off;" && redis-server /data/redis.conf
